message:
Merge PR #2030: fix(polecat): preserve remote branch when MR is pending in merge queue

Bug fix: when nuking a polecat, preserve the MR and remote branch if an open MR
exists so the refinery can complete the merge. Previously, nuke would reject the
MR and delete the remote branch, causing MQ/git sync inconsistency.

Fixes: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/issues/2028

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2030
Author: seanbearden (Sean Bearden)
